description_long: This ottoman features a round, dark fabric cushion draped with an ornate black cloth adorned with white geometric and floral patterns. The cloth is finished with a prominent pink fringe trim that hangs around the entire edge, adding a decorative and vintage touch. The base consists of a wooden pedestal with four curved legs, providing stability and a classic appearance. The overall design suggests a blend of Victorian and bohemian influences, making it suitable for both traditional and eclectic urban settings. The surface appears soft and inviting, ideal for sitting or resting items. The craftsmanship and detailing on the fabric and trim make this ottoman a visually striking accent piece.
description: A round ottoman with a black patterned cloth, pink fringe trim, and a wooden pedestal base. The ornate design and soft surface make it both decorative and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full round shape, detailed black patterned cloth, and pink fringe trim with the wooden base partially visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the side drape of the cloth and the continuation of the pink fringe, with more of the wooden base exposed.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the symmetry of the cloth's pattern and the even distribution of the fringe, with the wooden legs more centered.
description_view_3: Rear angled view showing the cloth's pattern wrapping around and the pink fringe, with the wooden base and legs visible from a different angle.
